title: ononis microphylla
intro: Ononis microphylla, also known as small-leaf restharrow or small-flowered restharrow, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and even exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. The herbal preparations of Ononis microphylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
